rules.name: Provider Terms Required
rules.rule: No affiliate, referral, or API-integrated provider placement may be published until provider terms, compensation eligibility, geographic availability, and disclosure requirements are reviewed.

rules.name: Third-Party Fulfillment Disclosure
rules.rule: Every third-party or affiliate placement must state that provider terms, availability, pricing, and fulfillment are controlled by the provider unless DFW Matchday Concierge separately confirms direct responsibility.

rules.name: Official Claim Block
rules.rule: Affiliate and referral placements must not imply official FIFA, tournament, host city, venue, team, or sponsor relationship unless directly verified and approved.

rules.name: Privacy-Sensitive Placement Block
rules.rule: Affiliate and referral ads are blocked from paid VIP, Team Family private, Media / Corporate private, activated premium, and privacy-sensitive hubs unless expressly approved as curated premium resources.

rules.name: Status Badge Required
rules.rule: Each affiliate or referral card must include Affiliate / Referral Link, Third-Party Provider, Official Source, Information Only, Availability Required, or Operator-Reviewed status as applicable.

rules.name: Data Privacy Review Required
rules.rule: Any placement that collects or transfers visitor data requires privacy review before publication.

standard_disclosures.affiliate_referral: Affiliate or referral link. DFW Matchday Concierge may receive compensation if you use this link. Third-party terms, availability, pricing, and fulfillment apply.
standard_disclosures.third_party_provider: Third-party provider. This option is listed for planning convenience. Final service terms, availability, pricing, and fulfillment are controlled by the provider unless DFW Matchday Concierge separately confirms direct service responsibility.
standard_disclosures.official_source: Official source link. Use this source for official event, venue, schedule, or policy information.
